name: Plinky Synth
description: Expressive 8-voice touch synthesizer with 64 main pads, sampler/oscillator voices, low-pass gates, delay/reverb, sequencer, arpeggiator, and TRS MIDI on v3.

controls.name: Main pads (64)
controls.description: Play the eight string voices and edit parameters by touch.

controls.name: Shift keys (8)
controls.description: Select presets, sequencer pages, parameters and samples with the main pads.

controls.name: Transport / mode pads
controls.description: Provide play, record, clear, previous, next and preset workflow control.

controls.name: Arrow column
controls.description: Acts as a vertical slider during parameter edit mode.

controls.name: Encoder
controls.description: Selects and edits parameters and presets.

controls.name: A / B knobs
controls.description: Offset the A and B modulators when those sources are used.

controls.name: Modulation rows
controls.description: Rows 6 and 7 control CV level, offset, depth, rate, shape and symmetry for the four modulators.

inputs.name: Pitch Input
inputs.description: V/oct input that transposes hand-played notes, arpeggiator or sequencer.

inputs.name: Gate Input
inputs.description: Scales the openness of the low-pass gates.

inputs.name: A, B, X, Y Inputs
inputs.description: Four modulation CV inputs with dedicated LFOs.

inputs.name: Clock Input
inputs.description: 16th-note / 4 PPQN clock input for sequencer and arpeggiator sync.

inputs.name: Audio Input
inputs.description: Stereo line / Eurorack audio input for effect processing or sampling.

inputs.name: TRS MIDI In
inputs.description: TRS MIDI input on Plinky v3.

outputs.name: Trigger Output
outputs.description: Trigger out for each note played by hand, the arpeggiator or sequencer.

outputs.name: Touch Output
outputs.description: Highest current finger pressure across the strings.

outputs.name: Pitch Hi / Lo Output
outputs.description: V/oct outputs for the highest and lowest notes being played.

outputs.name: Gate Output
outputs.description: Gate signal while one or more pads are being touched.

outputs.name: A, B, X, Y Outputs
outputs.description: Modulation outputs derived from the four mod sources.

outputs.name: TRS MIDI Out
outputs.description: TRS MIDI output on Plinky v3.

behaviors.name: Eight-string polyphony
behaviors.trigger: touch any of the 64 main pads
behaviors.description: Plinky plays eight separate string voices arranged as eight vertical strips, and each string can stack oscillators or grains for a dense polyphonic texture.

behaviors.name: Shift-pad editing
behaviors.trigger: hold a shift key and tap a pad
behaviors.description: The pad grid becomes a parameter editor, preset selector and sample browser rather than only a keyboard.

behaviors.name: Modulator quartet
behaviors.trigger: use A, B, X or Y as a source
behaviors.description: Each mod source has its own LFO, and modulators A and B also have physical knobs that add offset on top of any incoming CV.

behaviors.name: TRS MIDI performance
behaviors.trigger: feed Plinky v3 via MIDI In
behaviors.description: The v3 hardware supports external polyphonic sequencing over TRS MIDI while still letting a melodic line be played on top by touch.

behaviors.name: Input overdrive
behaviors.description: The input stage can saturate into crunchy fuzz, especially when fed with modular-level signals.

behaviors.name: Gate and touch CV extraction
behaviors.description: Plinky exposes gate, touch pressure, highest/lowest pitch and modulation CVs, so it can behave as both a synth voice and a controller for the rest of the rack.

patchIdeas.name: MIDI poly voice
patchIdeas.patch: TRS MIDI In from a keyboard or sequencer plays Plinky v3 as an 8-voice touch synth. The stereo output goes straight to the mixer while Pitch Hi / Lo and Gate Output can still drive external voices.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Plinky Synth:
* TRS MIDI In: enabled

Mixer:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:
Envelope:
VCA:

- MIDI Keyboard (Out) -> Plinky Synth (TRS MIDI In)
- Plinky Synth (Euro L / R) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Plinky Synth (Pitch Hi / Lo Output) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Plinky Synth (Gate Output) g> Envelope (Trig)
- VCO 1 (Out) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Mixer (In 2)

patchIdeas.name: Touch-controlled filter voice
patchIdeas.patch: Use the main pads to play Plinky, then send Touch Output to a filter cutoff and A Output to a VCA. The same finger pressure that opens the strings also animates the external analog voice.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Plinky Synth:

VCO:
Filter:
VCA:
Output:

- Plinky Synth (Touch Output) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Plinky Synth (A, B, X, Y Outputs) >> VCA (CV)
- Plinky Synth (Euro L / R) -> Output (In)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo sampler fuzz
patchIdeas.patch: Feed a drum loop into the audio input, raise the saturation, and modulate the delay or reverb with B and X. Plinky becomes a crunchy stereo processor that still keeps the touch keyboard available for overdubs.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Plinky Synth:

Delay:
Reverb:
Mixer:

- Drum Loop (Out) -> Plinky Synth (Audio Input)
- Plinky Synth (A, B, X, Y Outputs) >> Delay (Time CV)
- Plinky Synth (A, B, X, Y Outputs) >> Reverb (Mix CV)
- Plinky Synth (Euro L / R) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Delay (Out) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Reverb (Out) -> Mixer (In 3)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked touch sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Clock Input locks the arpeggiator or sequencer, Trigger Output retriggers envelopes, and Gate Output keeps a companion VCA open only while notes are held. The result is a compact touch-led pattern voice with external sync.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Plinky Synth:

Clock:
Envelope:
VCA:
Filter:

- Clock (Out) c> Plinky Synth (Clock Input)
- Plinky Synth (Trigger Output) t> Envelope (Trig)
- Plinky Synth (Gate Output) g> VCA (CV)
- Plinky Synth (Euro L / R) -> Filter (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Modulation bank
patchIdeas.patch: Route A, B, X and Y outputs to four destinations: filter cutoff, VCA level, delay time and stereo pan. The built-in LFOs make Plinky a four-lane modulation source even when no pads are being played.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Plinky Synth:

VCO:
Filter:
VCA:
Delay:
Mixer:

- Plinky Synth (A, B, X, Y Outputs) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Plinky Synth (A, B, X, Y Outputs) >> VCA (CV)
- Plinky Synth (A, B, X, Y Outputs) >> Delay (Time CV)
- Plinky Synth (A, B, X, Y Outputs) >> Mixer (Pan CV)
- Plinky Synth (Euro L / R) -> Mixer (In 1)
- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Mixer (In 2)
